title: Fact Check: Trump skipping son’s wedding over Bahamas entry ban on US rapists? Truth behind viral claim
description: A viral screenshot on X claimed Donald Trump skipped his son Don Jr.’s wedding celebrations in the Bahamas because of an alleged entry restriction. Later, another user asked Grok about the claim, leading to a separate response that challenged the community note. The post Fact Check: Trump skipping son’s wedding over Bahamas entry ban on US rapists? Truth behind viral claim appeared first on The Sunday Guardian .

title: India, US discuss Middle East, trade as US cites progress on Iran conflict
description: US Secretary ​of State ‌Marco Rubio held talks with ​Indian Foreign ​Minister Subrahmanyam Jaishankar ⁠on Sunday, ​as the two ​sides discussed the Middle East, trade, ​visas, maritime ​security and energy supplies. Rubio ‌said ⁠progress had been made in the ​past ​48 ⁠hours on efforts towards ​resolving the ​Iran ⁠conflict.

title: Cannibal killer found dead in jail cell after murdering brother and eating his eyeball
description: Matthew Hertgen, 31, was found dead at Mercer County Jail on May 8 in what is believed to be an apparent suicide

title: Drivers urged to keep 1 thing in cars on Sunday, Monday and Tuesday
description: Over the next few days, car journeys may quickly turn uncomfortable and even dangerous.

title: Teenager arrested after knife attack on busy Bolton road leaves man in hospital
description: A teenager has been arrested on suspicion of assault after an incident on Wigan Road yesterday evening (May 23).

title: Gold set to trade cautiously next week amid rising US yields, Middle East tensions
description: KUALA LUMPUR: Gold futures on Bursa Malaysia Derivatives are expected to trade cautiously next week as United States Treasury yields continue to rise significantly amid ongoing tensions in the Middle East.

title: Assam: Tension Erupts in Chhaygaon Over Proposed Cement Industry Project
description: Tension resurfaced at Govardhan Choudhurykhat under the Chhaygaon Revenue Circle in Kamrup district following renewed efforts to establish a proposed cement industry in the area.

title: Fans rally behind Jeremy Clarkson ahead of King Charles decision
description: Fans have rallied behind Clarkson's Farm star Jeremy Clarkson ahead of a knighthood decision by King Charles III.
